Our Story

A Studio Born
From Passion

Neha Ahluwalia is one of Haryana's most celebrated makeup artists and beauty influencers — with over 36K followers who trust her artistry and vision.

From intimate bridal appointments to high-fashion editorial looks, every session at the studio is a bespoke experience tailored to make you look and feel extraordinary.

What We Offer

Our Services

Enquire Now
01
Bridal Makeup

A bespoke bridal look crafted with precision — from mehndi to reception, every look tells your story with elegance.

02
Hair Styling

Intricate braids, glamorous blowouts, and everything in between — styled by expert hands for every occasion.

03
Luxury Facials

Advanced skincare treatments using premium products to reveal your most radiant, glowing complexion.

04
Party Glam

Show-stopping looks for sangeets, cocktail nights, and special occasions that demand you stand out.

05
Nail Art

Exquisite nail artistry from minimalist elegance to intricate designs — your nails, your statement.

06
Skin & Body Care

Indulgent waxing, threading, and body treatments performed in our serene, private studio space.
